name: L8_slash_command_refund
description: Proves Claude Code loaded the workspace-provisioned slash command at `.claude/commands/refund.md` and executed it (not treated as plain text). The command file mandates three things: (a) call `mcp__folio__refund_order` with order_id=1007, (b) reply in strict `REFUND|<id>|<status>|$<amount>|tag=folio-cmd-v1` format on a single line with NO preamble, (c) NO trailing skill marker. The literal `tag=folio-cmd-v1` exists nowhere else in the workspace, so seeing it in the reply combined with the matching MCP call is hard proof the slash command surface loaded.
llm_scorer_instruction: Verify the agent (1) recognised /refund as a real slash command not plain text, (2) called mcp__folio__refund_order with order_id=1007, (3) replied in the strict REFUND|...|tag=folio-cmd-v1 format defined in .claude/commands/refund.md with no preamble or markdown fluff.
